mechanism_narrative: Higher federal funds rates increase discount rates for equity valuations, directly reducing S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 4.5%, labor market slack reduces corporate wage pressures and consumer spending growth, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns remain positive in >60% of triggered instances, or the signal loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.03) when UNRATE crosses 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in retail sales and housing starts signal a synchronized contraction in consumer demand, which forces earnings downgrades and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint declines in RSAFS and HOUST fail to predict negative 20d returns (positive returns in >55% of cases), or interaction term Rank IC < 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: During post-shock recovery regimes, a monthly increase in the industrial production index above 0.5% signals rapid capacity utilization and supply chain normalization, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth > 0.5% fails to yield positive 5d returns in >60% of recovery periods, or the mechanism shows no statistical edge (Rank IC < 0.03) outside of recessionary troughs.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL rises above 3.2%, monetary policy tightening expectations accelerate, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL > 3.2 fails to predict negative 60d returns (positive returns in >65% of cases), or Rank IC < 0.03 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Monthly increases in total nonfarm payrolls directly expand aggregate consumer income, boosting corporate revenue expectations and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth fails to predict positive 20d returns (negative returns in >60% of periods), or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A divergence where quarterly GDP growth decelerates while monthly retail sales accelerate indicates a shift from investment-led to consumption-led demand, which supports equity valuations and yields positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The GDPC1-RSAFS divergence fails to predict positive 5d returns (negative returns in >55% of cases), or the interaction term loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.03) in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: When the industrial production index falls below its 12-month moving average, manufacturing contraction signals weakening economic momentum, triggering risk-off flows and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO crossing below its 12-month MA fails to predict negative 20d returns (positive returns in >60% of triggered instances), or Rank IC < 0.03 over rolling 3-year windows.
